summary.intent: Refactor Gossamer from an Electron desktop app into a VS Code extension to reduce install friction (auto-detect .entire/settings.json instead of manual repo registration) and improve context-switching between code editing and Claude session viewing.
summary.outcome: A fully functional VS Code extension was built and packaged as a VSIX with: sessions list, session detail view, native checkpoint tree sidebar, MCP server embedded at /mcp, QuickPick search with FTS, image rendering, agent-aware labels and commands, VSIX packaging script, and onboarding flow for new users.

repo: Each repo gets its own SQLite database at ~/.gossamer/repos/<name>.db; the top-level config is ~/.gossamer/config.json and is auto-created on first use
The server runs from gossamer-testing/dist/serve.js (the worktree), NOT gossamer/dist/serve.js — always rebuild in the worktree after editing in the main repo
custom-title events (from /rename) only exist in ~/.claude/projects/<encoded-path>/*.jsonl, NOT in shadow or checkpoint branches — must read those files directly
The .gossamer/checkpoints/ directory inside each repo is a git worktree for entire/checkpoints/v1; it gets recreated by the indexer and should be .gitignore'd
Session slugs (auto-generated names) come from LogEvent.slug and never change on /rename; the actual rename signal is the custom-title event type
Images are stored as base64 in full.jsonl files on entire/checkpoints/v1 but the schema had no imageData field — needed schema migration + backfill from LogEvent.data JSON column
Agent name (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, etc.) is stored in CheckpointSessionMetadata.agent
The stable server port is stored in ~/.gossamer/config.json (default 3456); old approach used getFreePort() which made MCP config impossible
Branch-log endpoint requires prefix matching (findRepoForPath) not exact match because session cwd can be a subdirectory of the registered repo root

code.finding: Was only including extension.ts and GossamerPanel.ts — SessionDetailPanel.ts and diffUtils.ts were never compiled, causing blank diff views. Fixed by changing to include: ['src/**/*.ts'] with exclude: ['src/webview']
acquireVsCodeApi() can only be called once per webview context — stored as window.__vscodeApi and reused in vscodeApi.ts to prevent double-call errors
onDidChangeViewState listener needed to call checkpointProvider.setSession() when e.webviewPanel.active — without this the checkpoint sidebar only updates on first open, not on tab switches

process.execPath points to VS Code's bundled Electron Node.js, not system Node. Must use execFileSync('which', ['node']) to get system Node for spawning server (avoids native module NODE_MODULE_VERSION mismatch)
root must be an absolute path (resolve(__dirname, 'src/webview')) not relative — relative paths resolve from CWD at build time which differs when run via workspace
The gossamer server is a static singleton that survives panel disposal — only killed on extension deactivate. This enables minimize/restore without server restart and keeps file watchers alive
server_ready must be re-sent via onDidChangeViewState when panel becomes visible — webview reloads from scratch when dragged to a new window, resetting React state

Scroll listener on Mantine ScrollArea viewport doesn't attach at [] effect time (ref is null). Check scroll position inline at the moment of the effect instead: el.scrollHeight - el.scrollTop - el.clientHeight < 80
Vite builds ESM output — script tag needs type='module', otherwise browser silently ignores the bundle and the panel appears blank

DB change detection replaced 500ms poll with fs.watch on .db, .db-wal, and parent dir (debounced 50ms). Shadow branch replaced 5s poll with fs.watch on .git/refs/ recursive + packed-refs (debounced 200ms). Both keep 30s fallback polls
resourceUri must use absolute paths for SCM file color decorations — the relative paths from filesTouched need to be joined with the repo root (currentRepoPath)

Session checkpoints should be filtered to createdAt <= last-log-event + 2min for completed sessions — otherwise Entire keeps tagging new commits to the same session ID post-completion, causing all branch history to appear under Session

workflow: Git worktrees have completely separate file copies — edits in the main repo do NOT sync to gossamer-testing; must explicitly cp changed files then rebuild in the worktree
When running extension via F5, add preLaunchTask to .vscode/launch.json so the extension builds automatically on a fresh clone
VS Code auxiliary windows (standalone popped-out panels) have no sidebar or activity bar — TreeView cannot be projected there, only webview-embedded UI works
VS Code's native vscode.diff only accepts Uri objects — use a TextDocumentContentProvider with a custom scheme for in-memory content (no temp files needed, inherently read-only)
VS Code TimelineProvider shows flat items only with no nested children — not suitable for file-tree-per-checkpoint display; native TreeView is richer for this use case
The gossamer.vsix and bundled-server/ are generated artifacts and should not be committed to git
StreamableHTTPServerTransport with sessionIdGenerator: undefined enables stateless MCP mode for simple POST-based tool calls — can be embedded directly in the Express server

friction: Server running from gossamer-testing/dist not gossamer/dist caused many 'why isn't my change working' debugging cycles — no automatic sync between worktree and main repo

native module NODE_MODULE_VERSION mismatch (better-sqlite3 compiled for system Node 141, VS Code uses Electron Node 140) — required spawning server as child process instead of importing Prisma directly
tsconfig.extension.json only included 2 files explicitly — SessionDetailPanel.ts and diffUtils.ts silently not compiled, causing blank diff views with no error
acquireVsCodeApi() double-call error was subtle — the minimize button inline script and React app both called it, failing silently
Prisma schema push created a stray ~/.gossamer/gossamer.db instead of using per-repo databases — required manual deletion and ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN on the correct DBs
custom-title rename events are NOT in shadow/checkpoint branches — discovering this required extensive grep through JSONL files before finding them in ~/.claude/projects/
Vite builds ESM output but VS Code webview HTML needs type='module' on the script tag — without it the panel loads blank with no console error in the webview
Session color information is not stored anywhere in Claude's files — cannot be read even though the UI displays it
open_items: Session color-coding in the sessions list — not stored anywhere in Claude Code's files yet, may be planned feature
gossamer.vsix and packages/vscode/bundled-server/ should be added to .gitignore since they're generated artifacts
The toggle panel keybinding (Ctrl+K G) may not fire when the webview has keyboard focus — needs investigation
Named session display in sessions table was tabled (session was renamed to 'gossamer-vscode' mid-discussion but the feature request was deferred)
The .gossamer/ worktree directory inside repos shows as untracked in git status — README recommends adding to .gitignore but individual repos need to do this themselves
Image rendering only works for sessions indexed after the schema migration; older sessions need manual re-sync to pick up images already in checkpoint branches
MCP server stdio wrapper (dist/mcp.js) still requires manual --port flag if using it outside the VS Code extension context
install-mcp.mjs script only handles ~/.claude.json and ~/.codex/config.yaml — other MCP-compatible clients not covered
